Sourdough Gallery

❧   ❦

Handcrafted with wild yeast & a lot of Sunday mornings

Sourdough Loaves

❧

Classic Loaf

Beautifully scored & baked to a deep golden crust,
served on heirloom china the way it deserves.

The Open Crumb

That interior doesn't happen by accident —
it's 48 hours of patience and wild fermentation.

Cheddar Inclusion

Aged cheddar folded into the dough and baked
into every crackling, molten-edged score.

The Cheese Pull

Ribbons of melted cheddar laced through
an open, tangy crumb. No notes.

Hotdog & Hamburger Buns

❧

Fresh From the Oven

Gloriously golden sourdough buns, pillowy soft inside
with just a whisper of tang.

Put to Work

Sturdy enough to hold all the toppings,
soft enough to make you forget the hot dog.
